home.seoDescription: Welcome to the portfolio and blog of Paweł Wielga — .NET Developer & Software Engineer.

hero.subtitle: Software Engineer with over 8 years of experience in .NET technologies. Specialized in desktop, web, and mobile applications for industrial environments, banking, and consumer solutions.
hero.underConstruction: Under construction - some content is just a placeholder.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Experienced .NET Software Engineer
about.paragraph1: With over 8 years of experience in .NET development, I specialize in designing and developing desktop, web, and mobile applications. My expertise spans complex systems in industrial environments (3D printing), banking solutions, and consumer-facing applications.
about.paragraph2: I excel in code analysis and performance-driven refactoring, building solutions based on MVVM patterns. My technical arsenal includes CI/CD pipelines, Docker containers, asynchronous communication (RabbitMQ, SignalR), and interface-driven architectures with dependency injection.
about.paragraph3: I finished work for mBank (via 7N) in June 2025. Since July 2025 I have been working at APN Promise (https://promisegroup.com), with previous experience at Zortrax S.A. where I built 3D printing software including Z-SUITE and Zortrax inCloud platforms.
about.seoDescription: About Paweł Wielga — experienced .NET Software Engineer working on desktop, web and mobile applications.
